spec_match.rationale: Combines AbortSignal.timeout() with await using so timeout cancels the whole scope's resource stack — sophisticated combined use of the proposal.

interactive.rationale: Two side-by-side scenarios (fast vs slow) showing scope exit in each case.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Card promises within-deadline + over-deadline scenarios; delivered.

edge_cases.rationale: Now demonstrates AbortSignal.any() with a timeout signal and a user-cancel signal, and shows the disposer firing for either winner.

summary: Verified with chrome-devtools-mcp 1.1.1 on Chrome Canary: clicked Run both scenarios and confirmed the right panel now times out by construction; ran the composed AbortSignal.any() scope with user cancel and timeout branches, each logging stack.disposeAsync(). Console and network were clean.
